name: Zapata Quantum, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Zapata Quantum is a leading pure-play hardware-agnostic quantum software company. Following a strategic realignment in 2025, the Company offers solutions to efficiently deploy and accelerate the development of quantum and hybrid quantum-classical computing applications. Founded in 2017 by researchers from a Harvard University Quantum Computing Lab, Zapata has built one of the industrys most robust intellectual property portfolios in quantum and hybrid quantum-classical computing ...
